rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly identified two injected faults in the es-config ConfigMap — a null node.name value causing startup crashes and a wrong namespace in discovery.seed_hosts (.default vs .elasticsearch) — then patched the ConfigMap and deleted the failed pod to trigger a clean restart. All three verification conditions were confirmed: cluster health is green with 3/3 data nodes and 0 unassigned shards, all three nodes (es-cluster-0, es-cluster-1, es-cluster-2) appear in /_cat/nodes, and the app-data index returns the seed document. The primary oracle verdict is pass. The two regression failures (stage_02 transform-job-recovery, stage_03 safe-downscale) are unrelated to this fix — they test different scenarios and are not caused by the agent's two mutations (ConfigMap patch + pod delete).
